summary: Iteration 272: Cross-Origin Isolation Headers (COOP/COEP) - All 11 header tests passed (100%). Browser testing confirmed window.crossOriginIsolated=true and SharedArrayBuffer available. Frontend shows 'Export MP4 in Browser' panel with 720p, MP4, scene count. StoryPreview page shows 'Your story is ready' banner with 3 options (Instant Preview, Export MP4, Story Pack).
